entry.title: Re: ONB Tasks Completed by Field Blank
entry.content: Thank you. We do have that turned on, we can see who completed the other steps just not the last one.

entry.title: Re: SAP Joule use cases in Treasury
entry.content:
Hi @HiramGarcia 
Please access our Artificial Intelligence site and learn how to automate processes, optimize resources, and predict outcomes to run faster and smarter enterprises.
Please also access our SAP Interactive Learning Journey  Financial Business Insights with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and Joule 
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Best Matching Technician and Exclusive Reservations
entry.content: We faced a scenario where the Best Matching Technician feature ignored a technician's exclusive reservation (PTO) and assigned an activity to them. How can we prevent assigning activities to technicians and stop suggesting technicians who have exclusive reservations?

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP: Is there a way to filter with additional bi...
entry.content:
Hello @wilson_lee,

In your additionalBinding please make sure the localElement is the field that you have in the current CDS which you use as Filter Logic in your case its "<Old Status>" and element: Should be the field of "<New Status>"  in ZC_STATUS_MAPPING_VH CDS View. Please note these are case Sensitive and make sure you have them correctly maintained. it will work as expected.

entry.title: S4 Public cloud 2408 - 3SL - Customizing tenant ( Creation of Custom Package in ADT )
entry.content:
Hi All

I have a couple of queries regarding CAPM API integration and customization tenant  in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

  1. Is it possible to access the CAPM API endpoint from a Fiori app and deploy the app in the Public Cloud Development tenant?
  2. Can we create a custom Z package in the customizing tenant?

Looking forward to your insights on this.

entry.title: Re: How do we call SOLR externally with SSO enabled?
entry.content: oops... forget my last question, I am now clear that we would go through Hybris and not need a dedicated SID.

entry.title: Re: Generate intercompany billing request based on the results of running allocation cycles (S4H Pub
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Work Zone launchpad tile points to wrong URL
entry.content:
I created and deployed a UI5 app, and then created a site using the Work Zone standard edition. I added a tile for my app but it loads indefinitely and the console shows an error saying the component.js file couldn't be loaded from the app's address. I verified the ui5AppInfo.json file and found that the cached url doesn't enclude the Business Solution, and only shows the app's ID. When I add the missing part with the debugger the app works fine.

How can I get the ui5AppInfo.json file to get the correct URL?

entry.title: Re: Open/Add/Remove buttons Risk in Subprocess are disabled
entry.content:
Hi @plaban_sahoo,

 

Please try to assign this with current date as timeframe, then it should be working properly.

 

Regards,

Lukasz

entry.title: Subscription Billing - Split Bill
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I was trying to configure a scenario, where we have to split invoices for partners. In our landscape we have Subscription Billing connected to S4H Convergent Invoicing Cloud.

I wanted to know if the - Bill Split Element functionality in the Billing tab of Manage Subscriptions app can be used for it  If so, how?

SAP Subscription Billing 

Best Regards

Navneet

entry.title: Re: controller and firefighter cannot be the same person
entry.content: I am seeing same issue. May I know if issue is resolved

entry.title: Asking if adding an industry key in vendor master data is considered an enhancement?
entry.content: Need help please.  We are cleaning up vendor master data for our move to S/4HANA; we are currently on ECC6 and part of what we are doing is evaluating the industry types and considering adding more appropriate industry types so we can group similar companies in the same industry together, and also 'deleting'/deactivating those industry types which are not needed anymore.  We were advised by our Corporate IT that it is considered an enhancement and we just have to wait post S/4HANA to do the clean-up.  Is it really an enhancement, or it is just a change in the configuration settings?  Is it also advisable to do the clean-up post S/4HANA and bring in uncleansed data?  We are not technical people but we are the ones accountable for vendor master data, which will now be BP in S/4HANA, and we haven't even been trained on the BP function in S/4.  Please help and thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to use a single position for multiple employees?
entry.content:
Hi @aradhanamokara 

By default the visibility is Not Visible, you need to make it visible if you want to see it.

Please refer the below to know more about it

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/cf23ba26985f4d4a8df3a34b7392847d/430b32585cef4da29cb9ce16119c58da.html

Thanks

Manish

entry.title: the early pay discount for pretax income
entry.content: the early pay discount that SAP takes is for the gross invoice total. our client wants for Non-COGS vendors,  early pay discounts to be taken pre-tax. Is there a way for this to be changed in SAP to accommodate Non-COGS vendors?

entry.title: Cost object description is not visible in the table.
entry.content:
You are trying to add a "Cost Object Description" to the "Free Cost Objects - Line Items" report. However, the field "Cost Object Description" contains no data. Also you checked the cost object master data in Cost and Revenue > Free Cost Objects and search for relevant cost object, You see that the "Cost Object Name" field is empty. However, when you click on the Cost Object ID to enter the "Cost Object Overview" screen, the "Cost Object Name" field will show the description.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cost object description is not visible in the table.
entry.content:
For the relevant free cost object you need to maintain the description in English as well as your local language or all the user languages what you use.

For example if you have maintained only in the Hebrew language. So when you login with specific language (Hebrew) the cost object description will show in Hebrew only. If you want to display the description in English than you need to maintain the Cost object Name as in English language also.

After this check the Cost Object Description in the master data it will show the description.

entry.title: Problems with random payload from tables in tabs
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a Classic Analytic Application with 5 Tabstrip Tabs. Every Tab has Charts and Tables. All Charts and Tables in all Tabs are configured with RefreshPausedAPI = Always Pause except Tab 1, because it's the Startup-Tab. 

After ~22sec all Charts in Tab 1 are loaded, but Chrome Dev Tools Network Tab still shows Payload, also Windows Task Manager has High CPU Usage from 0-42sec, although Tab 1 is finished at 22sec.

If I switch to another Tab (Tab 2) at 22sec the loading time of Tab 2 is about 15sec. If I wait 42sec and switch then to Tab 2 the loading time is only 5sec. So something is going on between 22-42sec that I cant see and which has nothing to do with Tab 1.

I checked Network Tab in Dev Tools and saw that some Tables create a Payload. Strangely only a few. In Tab 4 I got 2 Tables. One of them creates a Payload (Screenshot) and the other one doesnt. In Tab 5 I got 9 tables - 2 create a Payload, 7 dont. All tables are basically exactly the same. 

What is going on between 22-42sec where CPU Usage is still very high that the Dashboard is not really usable?

entry.title: Reset TFA for CDC administrator
entry.content:
Dear support,

 

can you please reset the 2FA for "xxyy.com" as an administrator for our CDC installation?

 

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reset TFA for CDC administrator
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Any other administrator of your environment can send a TFA Reset Email to the mentioned user.

0002702278 - How do I reset the two-factor authentication for my SAP Customer Data Cloud account? 

 

If an Administrator is not available, please provide the last three characters of the Partner secret key (located under the "Secret Key" link) and an API key or Partner ID.  SAP Support will reset the two-factor authentication for the user once the information has been provided and verified.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Solution Support

entry.title: Re: API that can get Cost Center and Manager fields by querying with worker's email
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. I'm very sorry for the delay!Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: TRM payment date in Transaction Manager greyed out
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Oracle Client install and use in python operator in S...
entry.content:
hi Jim,

In our case in addition to oracledb package we need to install oracle client as well and point the code in the custom operator to the location where the client library is installed. That is where we are having challenge. Oracledb package works by default in thin client mode which is working with certain oracle authentications but not all of them which has become a bottle neck.

Thanks..Vamsi

entry.title: BP Relationship enhance - Not saving data BUT050
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a requirement to create a new field on BP relationship for BP. Field was created as append for BUT050, BUPT configuration done. Field is displayed on ALV, but when we input values on newly created screen ( "Z" screen containing custom field ), data is not updated. When returning to ALV screen, updates are not there . It seems like cvi_bdt_adapter=>data_pai used in my ZBUB_BUPR_PAI_RELAT function module is not working. 

I followed below link as base:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GE0A2Ae1Z4Q 

Any hint or suggestion ?  Has someone done this kind of enhancement ? 
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Msg No. SG105
entry.content: I have already maintained the currency exchange rate in OB08.Still this problem occurs.

entry.title: In the Budget Monitoring report, the encumbrance value is negative.
entry.content:
The  encumbrance value is negative in the Budget monitoring report for the current year.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: In the Budget Monitoring report, the encumbrance valu...
entry.content:
To solve this issue, you have to do budget balance carryforward for previous fiscal year, you see the value in encumbrance column is negative for current year because the carryforward was not done for the previous fiscal year.

After completing this budget balance carryforward, check the encumbrance column value for the current year in the budget monitoring report, the encumbrance amount here should be positive.

entry.title: Re: Data Ownership Sharing Options
entry.content: Have you found a solution on your own on the subject?

entry.title: [Q] MaxDB System Copy - VERY FRUSTRATED !!!
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am in a very stupid situation when trying to create a MaxDB system copy !!

1. Database Studio is NOT working !! With dbmcli I can login using the CONTROL user without ANY problems!
But Database Studio says - No no no, incorrect login! How come ??

2. I am installing the Database Instance with SWPM. When creating the Backup Template, I had to point to one of the backup files (there are 15 backup files in total). It would not let me just select the directory!
Then the restore doesn't work and SWPM gives an error message:

-3070, A previous data recovery was incomplete and must be repeated

Then I found some more advanced command and it said - Next media needed !!

Now I realized, that the thing sees just ONE backup file and is unable to get the others! Alright, fine! Let's define the others !! I found the medium_put command, but to my BIGGEST FRUSTRATION it doesn't seem to be able to add numerous mediums to the backup template !!! Every time when I try to add a new medium, I found out that the one that I did in the previous step had vanished !!! WHY ???!!!??? This CAN be done with the Database Studio !! But it doesn't let me login !!! This is totally hilarious !!

PLEASE provide some advice! Many thanks!

entry.title: Seeking Guidance on EWM RF Program Navigation Challenges
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently developing an RF program in EWM where I need to navigate between logical transactions based on specific conditions. I’m attempting to achieve this through the method /SCWM/CL_RF_BLL_SRVC=>SET_LTRAN, but I’m encountering three key challenges:

  1. Skipping the First Screen: When calling the second logical transaction, I need to skip the first screen, similar to how "Call Transaction 'ZAAAA'" allows skipping the first screen.
  2. Returning to the Same Location: Upon returning from the logical transaction ZAAAA transaction, I need the program to return to the exact location where the transaction was originally called, akin to the behavior in traditional module pools or when using LEAVE TO PROGRAM.
  3. SET_LTRAN Limitation: There is a limitation with the SET_LTRAN method, as I cannot use it more than six times.

Considering these challenges, I was thinking of creating a new logical transaction and using import/export in the INIT to address the first point. However, I am unsure how to effectively handle the second and third points.

Is there a way to achieve the traditional module pool functionality within an EWM RF program while addressing these limitations?

Any suggestions or advice would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

EWM - Basic Functions EWM - Radio Frequency

entry.title: Re: Get Notified when New Excel Plugin Version
entry.content: This page helps, I can plan for the same. Thank you, Andrei_Lupu

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content: I tried this and somehow it still doesnt work. I created table widget. Added row diemnsions.

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get co...
entry.content: I tried this and somehow it still doesn't work. I created table widget as a cross tab. Added row diemensions. Added column dimensions as objective Id and Weight. Basically adding objective Id and weight as column dimension should automatically count and sum weightage right? This doesn't seem to work.

entry.title: Re: Story Report in SuccessFactors- I am trying to get count of objectives every employee has.
entry.content: I tried this and somehow it still doesn't work. I created table widget as a cross tab. added row dimensions and then added column dimensions i.e. objective Id and weight. This should have auto calculated columns and sum. I also trid creating cross calculation colun then selected aggregation type as Sum and dimension as weight. even this doens't show correct value. .

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA DATA: Avoid Costly Problem with Test Data Express
Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content: Can you please include a screenshot of the field that you didn't mark as required? I have not been able to reproduce this case from my side

entry.title: Re: Signavio process manager - Translation of the diction...
entry.content:
Good day SAnddie,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community.  To provide further support, we 

recommend that you create a support case using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password).  

You will need to select the specific SAP Signavio product / component as shown in the example below.

System:  
Search for SAP Signavio   

 

Product Area:  
SAP Signavio Process Manager > SAP Signavio Process Manager  

 

Component:  
BPI (Business Process Intelligence)  

---  
BPI-PI (SAP Signavio Process Insights) or  

BPI-SIG (SAP Business Transformation Suite by SAP Signavio) – Product & Topic  

For further information you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center .

 

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: How to see my transports in Quality and Productive Systems?
entry.content:
Hi SAP support Team,

 

We want to see details of transport in Test System and in Production as well. Could you provide us Role name thus we can see those details?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to see my transports in Quality and Productive Sy...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

In Quality and Productive Systems, you'll be able to see and import your transports in Import Collection app. This app is included in SAP_CORE_BC_SL_IMP Business Catalog which is included in the Business Role Template SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR.
 
Once you release your TR in Customizing Tenant, it will reach Quality System. Then, you can import it in Quality System and forward it to Productive System. 
Kindly check the documentation SAP Help Portal | Import Collection for more information. 

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: New Road Maps for SAP Business Network - Supplier Portal Private Edition and Commerce Automation
entry.content:
As part of our ongoing enhancements to SAP Activate Methodology content, we are excited to announce the release of two new road maps: SAP Business Network for Supplier Portal Private Edition and SAP Business Network for Commerce Automation. Both road maps are now available in SAP Road Map Viewer and SAP Cloud ALM.

SAP Business Network for Supplier Portal Private Edition is a cloud-based solution designed to support seamless collaboration between buyers and suppliers through a unified portal. It enables smooth data exchange with SAP S/4HANA, automates key procurement workflows, and helps drive efficiency by minimizing manual effort. The solution also enhances collaboration across the network, accelerating digital transformation and delivering better business outcomes.

This solution is now included as an entitlement for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition customers who have selected the Premium or Premium Plus service packages. These customers receive access to the core capabilities of Supplier Portal Private Edition at no additional licensing cost. Please note that project implementation, custom extensions, and optional supplier enablement services may involve additional fees.

The implementation road map follows the 5 phases of SAP Activate (Prepare, Explore, Realize, Deploy, and Run) and focuses on two key workstreams: Supplier enablement and Data configuration and integration.

Each phase covers key activities such as:

SAP Business Network for Commerce Automation is a cloud-based solution designed to automate procurement and invoicing processes between buyers and suppliers. It enables the efficient electronic exchange of transactional documents such as purchase orders, order confirmations, advanced ship notices, service entry sheets, and invoices, reducing manual effort and improving process efficiency.

By providing real-time visibility into transaction status and history, Commerce Automation enhances collaboration between trading partners and helps enforce procurement policies and regulatory compliance.

While Commerce Automation itself focuses on transactional automation, the data it manages can be leveraged for spend analysis and supplier performance monitoring when combined with complementary analytics solutions, such as SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP Ariba Supplier Management. These tools provide deeper insights into spend patterns, supplier performance scorecards, risk profiles, and sustainability metrics.

The Commerce Automation road map is structured into the 5 phases of SAP Activate (Prepare, Explore, Realize, Deploy, Run) and supports rapid, scalable deployment with AI-driven insights and faster time-to-value. The key activities across these phases include:

For a detailed view of all activities and deliverables in each phase, we encourage you to explore the SAP Business Network for Supplier Portal Private Edition and SAP Business Network for Commerce Automation road maps directly in SAP Road Map Viewer or SAP Cloud ALM.

We also welcome your feedback and questions — feel free to share your thoughts directly in the comments section of this blog post. Your input helps us continuously improve the guidance and materials we provide.

Get to know more at:

New SAP Activate Implementation Roadmap for SAP Business Network for Supplier Portal Public Edition

Optimize SAP Implementation with SAP Activate Methodology and Guided Implementation in Cloud ALM

SAP Business Network Commerce Automation | Procurement Collaboration

Deploying SAP Business Network Supplier Portal with SAP S/4 HANA Cloud

Unlocking Success with SAP Activate Methodology and SAP Roadmap Viewer Tool

Last 10 SAP Activate 1 Minute Video's - SAP Community

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Community

SAP Activate Community

SAP Activate Minute Playlist

entry.title: Re: Msg No. SG105
entry.content: @NIK1707 Please show the screenshots, explain the transaction code where the error happens, etc. Also check the SAP notes.

entry.title: Mapping the Source structure to Target structure using Groovy Script.
entry.content:
Hey Readers, It's been a long time since I posted a blog again! But believe me I just came up with an interesting topic. I am sure at one or the other point it will be useful! 😀

Do you know that we can map the data and convert it to json format without using palette options?
 🤔 Obviously yes!

In this blog lets see about how to map the data and convert back to json format without using the message mapping and converters in integration flow.

Of course, I am not very good at coding 😅 but yes! I follow some simple tricks to make our work easy in our day to day life.

Objective:
Map the incoming data to target structure and convert back to JSON format using Groovy Script.

Source Structure:

{
    "id": "456783421908765z",
    "time": "2025-01-13T08:25:37.066663700Z",
    "data":
    {
        "moduleName": "Create",
        "firstName": "SAP",
        "lastName": "CPI",
        "startDate": "02/16/2025",
        "endDate": "03/31/2025",
        "code": "1234"
    }
}

Target Structure:

{

       "uniqueID": "456783421908765z" ,
        "module": "Create",
        "fName": "SAP",
        "lName": "CPI",
        "startDate": "02/16/2025",
        "endDate": "03/31/2025"
}

Integration Flow Details:
Step1: Lets build a simple integration flow by adding a groovy script.

Step2: For capturing the incoming payload lets create a property in the content modifier. If the value is true then capture the payload else not.

Step3:
Ah! Our most important code in this blog... Lets add some pieces of code to do mapping in groovy without using palette options.

def Message processData(Message message)
{
def messageLog = messageLogFactory.getMessageLog(message);
def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String;

//get properties
def log = message.getProperty("log") as String;

//log input payload
if(log == "true")
{
if(messageLog != null)
{
messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("Input Payload", body.toString(), "text/plain");
}
}

//extract data from the json
Map jsonMsg = new JsonSlurper().parseText(body);

def id = jsonMsg.id;
def moduleName = jsonMsg.data.moduleName;
def firstName = jsonMsg.data.firstName;
def lastName = jsonMsg.data.lastName;
def sDate = jsonMsg.data.startDate;
def eDate = jsonMsg.data.endDate;

//construct Target payload
def jbuilder = new JsonBuilder();
def jslurpur = new JsonSlurper();

jbuilder
{
uniquelD id
module moduleName
fname firstName
lname lastName
startDate sDate
endDate eDate
}

output_payload = jslurpur.parseText(jbuilder.toString());
message.setBody(JsonOutput.toJson(output_payload));
return message;

}

Execution:

Finally, Its time to execute! I have executed the code  by using groovy IDE.

Tadaaa! The Output is here! 🤗

You can also see the input payload attached on the bottom right side of the page under
'Attachments'.


Okay then, I hope this blog is informative! Let's catch up on the next blog.


please feel free to drop a comment and don't forget to follow me on linkedin
Mounika - Linkedin 

Thanks & Regards,
Mounika.

entry.title: Monitor material coverage ,time till shortage can be configured
entry.content: In Monitor material coverage we are able to configure Shortage definition like that will be able to configure Time till shortage ?

entry.title: SAP C4C V2 Extension Scenarios on Custom Fields
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

In C4C V1 we had a functionality called extension scenarios for each extension field. Just wonder if this feature is available in V2 or if it will be replaced for another functionality.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Opening transaction in SAPGUI for HTML via URL fails...
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. Unfortunately, it did not solve the problems.

entry.title: Different results between iRPA and Build Process Automation after API call
entry.content:
Hi,

I have built an automation consisting of making an API call to retrieve all the records of road traffic offences that happened in a given fleet of vehicles.

I first built it in iRPA and when I test, the request goes fine: I get 315 pages of 20 records each, and 1 page of 14 records (total of 6314 records). This is consistent with tests made in Postman which also return 315 pages of 20 records, and 1 page of 14 records.

I then exported the same project to SAP Build Process Automation (installed in another subaccount) and tested the automation: the request works well, the test session ends without error, except it only returns 2000 records (100 pages - or 100 iterations).

Do you have any idea what would cause this? Is there some kind of limitations when testing in SAP Build Process?

Let me know if you need me to go into further detail.

Thanks beforehand for your help.

Kindest regards,

LM.

entry.title: Re: Selection of text for copying not possible in Webdynpro
entry.content:
I came across the same issue today and could not find any solution anywhere. 
So I thought I will share my findings here: 

SAP listens for almost all browser events to enable special features like drag and drop for some controls. However, this causes basic features like selecting text to stop working.

There is an event handler for the selectstart event in/sap/public/bc/ur/nw7/js/lightspeed.js:

 

UCF_Control.prototype.onselectstart = function(e) 
{
    this.bAllowTextSelection ? e.oDomEvent.returnValue = !0 : 
      (UCF_UserAgent.bIsTrident(7) || UCF_UserAgent.bIsEdgeHtml() || 
       UCF_UserAgent.bIsSafari() || UCF_UserAgent.bIsFirefox() || 
       UCF_UserAgent.bIsChromium()) && e.cancel(),
     e.cancelBubble()
}

 

 

 

It appears that the web dynpro elements have a property bAllowTextSelection wich is false by default.
I was not able to find a setting in the web dynpro view to change this at design time. 

There is a function that will enable text selection for a certain element when called:

 

 

 

UCF_Control.prototype.allowTextSelection(e)

 

 

 

However, it its quite inconvenient to call this for all elements. Therefore, I am now using kind of a makeshift solution by simply blocking the event handler that disables text selection with my own handler. This function will block the DOM events from beging propagated to the framework code:

 

 

 

window.addEventListener("selectstart", function(event) { 
  event.stopPropagation(); 
}, true);

 

 

 

Please note:

  • To add custom javascript to a web dynpro application, use an HTML_ISLAND element and add an HTMLSCRIPT. I put the javascript code in a file, uploaded it to the MIME repository and linked it to the script element. Adding javascript in a <script> tag in some custom HTML (e.g. with the HTML_FRAGMENT element in web dynpro) will not work because the browser will not invoke any scripts that are added to the DOM after rendering. 

  • This solution might prevent some features of some elements from working properly. Only use this if you create your own web dynpro and know what you are doing.

entry.title: Re: Deployment Scheduling in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Thomas @thomas_hochstrasser,

Maybe we can add a config option for deployment schedules whether successfully imported features shall be set to Deployed directly. I will put it to the request list. 

Best regards,

Moritz

entry.title: Re: How to authorize Direct Debit Payments outside SEPA in Contract Accounting
entry.content: You write above in 2023 .... "in the near future, we are planning to enable it (DDM) for FI-AR as well".  When will it be available in S4HC (public cloud)?  When can we expect this with Accounts Receivable without enablement of Contract Accounting?

entry.title: Re: Selection of text for copying not possible in Webdynpro
entry.content:
I came across the same issue today and could not find any solution anywhere. 
So I thought I will share my findings here: 

SAP listens for almost all browser events to enable special features like drag and drop for some controls. However, this causes basic features like selecting text to stop working.

There is an event handler for the selectstart event in/sap/public/bc/ur/nw7/js/lightspeed.js:

 

UCF_Control.prototype.onselectstart = function(e) 
{
    this.bAllowTextSelection ? e.oDomEvent.returnValue = !0 : 
      (UCF_UserAgent.bIsTrident(7) || UCF_UserAgent.bIsEdgeHtml() || 
       UCF_UserAgent.bIsSafari() || UCF_UserAgent.bIsFirefox() || 
       UCF_UserAgent.bIsChromium()) && e.cancel(),
     e.cancelBubble()
}

 

It appears that the web dynpro elements have a property bAllowTextSelection wich is false by default.
I was not able to find a setting in the web dynpro view to change this at design time. 

There is a function that will enable text selection for a certain element when called:

 

UCF_Control.prototype.allowTextSelection(e)

 

However, it its quite inconvenient to call this for all elements. Therefore, I am now using kind of a makeshift solution by simply blocking the event handler that disables text selection with my own handler. This function will block the DOM events from beging propagated to the framework code:

 

window.addEventListener("selectstart", function(event) { 
  event.stopPropagation(); 
}, true);

 

Please note:

  • To add custom javascript to a web dynpro application, use an HTML_ISLAND element and add an HTMLSCRIPT. I put the javascript code in a file, uploaded it to the MIME repository and linked it to the script element. Adding javascript in a <script> tag in some custom HTML (e.g. with the HTML_FRAGMENT element in web dynpro) will not work because the browser will not invoke any scripts that are added to the DOM after rendering. 

  • This solution might prevent some features of some elements from working properly. Only use this if you create your own web dynpro and know what you are doing.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Q2/2025 Portuguese & Spanish Webinar Sessions
entry.content:
Hello Everybody!
We, from SAP Cloud ALM team, are pleased to invite you to register for our Q2/2025 webinars on SAP Cloud ALM.

Join us for an exclusive series of webinars and explore essential topics that will transform the management of your SAP systems. Get ready to delve into detailed discussions, gain valuable insights, and discover advanced strategies that will enhance the efficiency and security of your business processes. Register through the corresponding links:

All sessions will be held in the BRT (GMT-3) time zone.

entry.title: Re: Process Integration Runtime not available in Productive instance of Integration Suite

entry.title: Can embedded esPP be used as part of S/4 Hana 2023 functionalities?
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I have been going through SAP notes and I am getting confused regarding the pre-requisites for esPP.

- SAP Note 3225917 explains restrictions and release information for S4HANA 2022 and it is clear it can be used embedded.

- SAP Note 3475869  explains the same but specific for S4HANA 2023 however it is just specifying that it can be used embedded for Private Cloud.

I am currently working with S4HANA 2023 and I need to understand if esPP cannot be used for this version or if, as it was already since HANA 2022, it can be used embedded or after a side-by-side implementation.

Also, I would like to know if I would require additional license or, if embedded, it's part of the available functionalities.

Thanks a lot!!

entry.title: Condition Amount or Percentage into ME21N PO - how to block it?
entry.content:
Hi guys...

In the company we are taking from PUR-Req the valuation amount, then we go to ME21N and pull into the PO the values from PUR-Req, here our issue:

Into the tab CONDITIONS, at item detail for position we have the possibility to modify the amount into the field KOMV-KBETR,  ¿how can we to block this field? since the PR has been approved by our release procedure, we want no body is able to change de price or value into de PO.

I will appreciate any kind of help for this.

Regards

Omar Perea

MM Purchasing

entry.content:
I need to know where is this indicator configurated to automatically so that it is automatically marked in all my service POs.

Also want to know what this unlimited overdeliver indicator exact functionality is?

entry.title: Re: Part 3 – SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition: Flexible Data Extraction via the Custom CDS View App
entry.content: can i enble delta extraction as well ?

entry.title: Employee Central Head of Department Automatism (PART 2)
entry.content:
INTRODUCTION

Looking back on this first blog of 2021, Employee Central Head of Unit Automatism, and moving forward with the idea of ​​always improving automation proposals, this blog part 2 proposes a more complete and efficient automation so that whenever we have a change in the head of department, the system does so autonomously but always based on the Position Head of Department, which is our key data field.

CONTEXT

It's common for customers to ask for a "Position Head of Department" in addition to the "Person Head of Department." Along with this request, there's often a desire for automation—when the Person Head changes, the update should automatically be reflected in the Department based on the already assigned Position Head. As per standard, the "Person Head of Department" field requires manual updates, however, and as stated above, a new proposal comes to make this automation possible in a simpler way.

Let's look at the details of how the new proposal turned out.

SOLUTION

Step 1

Create a custom field in the Position Object that will be used to trigger the Head of Department update.

                                             Image from demo

Step 2

Create a business rule that will update the new custom field when the "To be Hired" (TBH) field is updated, only for managerial positions and only if the position is assigned as Head of Department.

                                             Image from demo

Assign the rule onSave in the Position Object.

Step 3

Create an Intelligent Services Center (ISC) and an Integration Center (IC) to Update the Head of Department when the position triggers it, so you must have a "flag" in the Position to mark if it is a head/managerial or not.

                                             Image from demo

ISC Note: A rule was created to only trigger in case the employee’s position is assigned as the head of his/her department.

Integration Center Details:

Here I am using the source table as Position Object and the target table as Department Object.

Mapping:

  • Position start date to the Department start date
  • Position department code to the Department object code
  • Head of Department is a calculated field to either clean up or assign the Position Head incumbent.

                                             Image from demo

This concludes the configuration part. Now let's take a look on the expected results.

EXPECTED RESULTS

  1. Stephanie Thorn is the head of department, and she was terminated on 31/01/2025.

Before Termination:

          Image from demo

After Termination:

Job Info

                                             Image from demo

Position

                                             Image from demo

Department

                                             Image from demo

      2. Hired a new Manager to the Head of Department Position

Job Info

                                             Image from demo

Position

                                             Image from demo

Department

                                             Image from demo

NOTE: Please note that for the system to trigger Position ISC you must enable the "Raise events when a position is created or updated" setting under "Position Management Settings > Integration".

CONCLUSION

This blog post described how to automate the Person Head of Department based on the Position Head of Department using ISC and IC, covering cases where the incumbent of the Position Head changes due to terminations, transfers, new hires.

With the proposed solution we aim to prevent manual maintenance and increase data quality.

Looking forward to your comments and questions.

entry.title: Re: LMS Search for Library-No libraries were found with t...

entry.title: How to download/extract custom Fiori app source code from ECC
entry.content:
Hi folks, 

I'm trying to download/extract the source code of some custom Fiori apps that have been deployed to our ECC system. These were developed and deployed around 9 years ago and the consultant that developed is long gone. The reason I want to get the project folders is so that I can upload them into BAS if I need to make changes but also have them in case we want to use it for our S4 migration happening soon. I can see the applications in SE80 but there's no to download them from SE80 as a BSP application. Any advice, tips, or suggestion I would very much appreciate. Please ask me anything if you want clarity as well.

entry.title: Auto Usage Decision for SAP PM Calibration Process
entry.content:
This blog might be helpful for rare client requirements: Auto Usage Decision for the SAP PM Calibration Process, offering the easiest standard approach. It can also assist implementation consultants in proposing solutions for the design of Calibration Orders' UD (Usage Decision) without human intervention.

 

Client Requirement: Auto Usage Decision for SAP PM Calibration Process

Creation Variant:

  • Step 1: Enter T-code QA40.
  • Step 2: Select the radio button "Orders Released".
  • Step 3: Press CTRL+SAVE, then save the variant with a name and short description.
  • Step 4: Variant is saved with the program RQEVA150.
  • Step 5: Follow the standard Batch Job creation process for the PM Calibration Process.

 

Batch Job Creation Process for Auto Usage in SAP PM:

  • Step 1: Access SM36 (Define Background Job).
  • Step 2: Enter a descriptive Job Name.
  • Step 3: Select Job Class (A, B, or C based on priority).
  • Step 4: Define Job Step by clicking the "Step" button.
  • Step 5: Enter the Program Name (e.g., IPM_ORD_CREATE).
  • Step 6: Define Selection Parameters (e.g., plant, order type).
  • Step 7: Set Job Variants (if applicable).
  • Step 8: Set Date and Time for job execution (or schedule periodically).
  • Step 9: Save the job.
  • Step 10: Use SM37 to monitor job execution and check logs/results.

Best regards,

Sharanabasanagouda.M

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Situation type PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR not found

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Services Upgrade to 4.3 SP3 on Azure cloud -...
entry.content:
Hi Kiran,

There are 03 scenario's is up to you which one to pick as per your landscape.

Scenario I: - If network connectivity or network latency is not an issue, then better to move current H/W from on-prem to cloud using Azure Tool in this case only you have to make sure that after migration below configuration are in SYNC

  • O.S H/W configuration (CPU, RAM & Virtual Memory) status before and after migration
  • Drive space status before and after migration
  • Data store connectivity status before and after migration
  • Source file (Network Path) connectivity status before and after migration
  • Assuming machine name is same, so that no impact to current configuration only changes of IP address which will be taken care with th ehelp of network team (firewall security)

Once On-Prem to cloud migration is done, you are done with the post validation take a break for 1-2 weeks and then go for upgrade in this scenario you will not face any issue related to credentials and connectivity.

Scenario II: - Build new environment with same IPS & BODS version, assuming database is pointing to same repositories (CMS, Audit, Local repository, Secure Central repository & Profile repository)

  • Perform installation with dummy database and then switch it to current CMS & Audit database so that you will get the same configuration
  • Activate Local repository, Secure Central repository & Profile repository via CMC console
  • Update Job Server configuration.

Once on-prem IPS & BODS version setup is done, with the post validation take a break for 1-2 weeks and then go for upgrade in this scenario you need ODBC to be setup in new server, also you need credential for all data store where credential is required, also you have to make sure Source file (Network Path) connectivity will work as expected or else coordinate with network team and get it sorted.

Scenario III: - Build new environment with updated IPS & BODS version, using promotion manager copy the content from on-prem landscape.

  • Perform installation with new CMS & Audit database
  • Using Promotion manager migrate the content
  • Create new Local repository, Secure Central repository & Profile repository via DSMC
  • Activate Local repository, Secure Central repository & Profile repository via CMC console
  • Import ATL in new Local repository
  • Delete Job server details from Local repository via DB's.
  • Map new Local repository to Job Server
  • Validate the data store, changes of failing where ever network path and credential is required, please make sure you have credential for all DB's also network connectivity should be in SYNC with new Azure server

I hope this will help!!!

Regards,

Daya Jha

entry.title: Re: Numbering during create and create by association in RAP
entry.content:
Does the use of UUID comes under early numbering concept in manage scenario ? rest is clear to me, they are just normal counter methods if we not use early numbering in behavior definition  we can still leverage this functionality in cbaitem and during creation of header id in unmanage scenario.

My doubt is what are industry standard ?

Because we usually use number range in projects and UUID just throws a random number, what if i want a set range like from 1000 with SNO-1000 sequence in my manage scenario ?

Thanks @Ismail_05 For Blog

entry.title: Re: Inquiry about MRP plan order generation divided into...
entry.content:
Hello Kimminah,

I think you are in a Make-2-Stock scenario using e.g. strategy 40 and lot size EX. Based on this the smallest unit for the MRP is a day. All requirements from a day will get covered by one planned order. The MRP will use the production version with the higher quantity as requirement. In you case it is 50:50 but if it would be 40:60 than the MRP would pick the production version with the 60%-PIR. This is the standard behaviour by the system.

As an alternative: If you just want to make sure that your demands are split between the two existing production versions, you can also work with quota arrangements.

Regards

Johannes

entry.title: Re: Hey, can anyone tell my which scope item describes th...
entry.content:
Hello Jana,

there is only the scope item BLL available, but there are not further details about how to use serial numbers in the production process. 

Here you can find some more details: https://help.sap.com/

Regards

Johannes

entry.title: Re: How to generate PIR with production version?
entry.content:
Hello Kimminah,

unfortunately the maintain PIR app does not support the production version. At the moment, there is also no possibility using the API for S/4HANA Public Cloud. The API also does not support production versions for PIR.

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: Requirement to Verify Group Journal Entries
entry.content: Hi Abha, That’s a great question! Group Journal Entry Workflow is an essential feature for financial consolidation, and having a way to track approvals is crucial. While SAP provides Verify General Journal Entries for standard journals, for Group Journal Entries, you might need a custom Fiori report or a workaround using Manage Workflows for Journal Entries.

entry.title: Re: How to Pull Header text of Purchase Requisition to Pu...
entry.content:
Hello,

please check this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/copy-purchase-requisition-header-note-to-purchase-order/qaq-p/12369331

Regards

Johannes

entry.title: Re: Purchasing group not auto populating in Purchase requ...
entry.content:
Hello Sandip,

  • Configuration Check: Ensure that the configuration in the MMPUR_V_MG2PGRP table is correct and active. Sometimes, even a small typo can cause issues.
  • User Settings: Verify if there are any user-specific settings that might be overriding the default values. In the "Create Purchase Requisition - Advanced" app, you can check the Personal Settings to see if any default values are set that might be interfering

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: connection options between S/4 Hana Private Cloud and...
entry.content:
SAP router is usually used to expose the system to external networks.
You mentioned customer has S/4 Hana Rise means S/4 Hana Private cloud i am not sure what is link between SAP on-premise router and S/4 Hana Rise and how it will help for integration.

What is your requirement exactly then it will be easy to understand?
Usually we will send the payroll posting document from ECP system to S/4 hana for financial posting.
If this is the requirement yes this is possible using IDOCS there is an implementation guide provided by SAP for this.
Refer this link:https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_PAYROLL/e8a7877791cb4015a062c852fc0340b9/e1fdde1cec9942a695cb764eb00a2b91.html

Let me know if you have further queries.

I would suggest to use the Activate method.Use the roadmap viewer and select SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
https://me.sap.com/roadmapviewer

Based on the phase you receive all necessary steps to plan.

Regards Johannes

Dear SAP Community,

I would like to use Worklist plugin in CUSTOM POD in SAP Digital Manufacturing.
Since there is no POD Selection plugin available in the CUSTOM POD, how can we fetch worklist items.
Is there a way that we could use 'custom UI Pod Plugin' to filter 'Core worklist Plugin'.

Thanks in Advance!

Anvesh

entry.title: Re: Positioning SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Thank you for your message and for sharing your experience with the new BTP Business Suite learning journey.

If you are unable to enter data in the test environment, this could be due to several reasons, such as missing authorizations, a temporary system issue, or specific configuration requirements for this particular training environment.

Here are a few steps you could try:

  1. Check your assigned role and authorizations: In some cases, learners need to be assigned specific roles to interact with the test system.
  2. Verify browser compatibility: Ensure you are using a supported browser (Chrome, Edge, etc.) and clear cache/cookies if necessary.
  3. Check if the system is in read-only mode: Some training environments are initially set to read-only, and activation for data entry might be triggered by completing a previous step in the learning journey.
  4. Reach out to the official training support: If the issue persists, I would recommend contacting the learning platform’s support team directly — they can check your account setup and test environment configuration.

(This message was drafted with the support of ChatGPT, who helps me sometimes with quick replies and technical explanations.)

entry.title: Cost Calculation in inter Company Sales Process
entry.content:
Inter Company Sales

1. Customer Places order in A Company  with Plant of B company

2. Goods are delivered from B Company to the end customer

3. A company will raise an invoice to the Customer(COGS in B Company)

4. B will raise an inter Company invoice to A Company

Can anyone explain how is cost calculated in both invoices

Is there any process where COGS entry will automatically happen in ordering company after doing PGI in deliver company for intercompany sales process?

entry.title: Unlocking Business Opportunities at Siemens through the Power of Localization and Clean Core
entry.content:
As a global business leader, navigating the complexities of local regulations and market specificities while maintaining a large-scale operation can be daunting. At SAP, we have seen the transformative power of localization — the strategic adaptation of business processes to meet local needs. Today, I want to share how Siemens is leveraging SAP's localization capabilities to streamline its global operations. We had the pleasure of speaking with two seasoned professionals at Siemens: Ms. Andrea Spandau and Mr. Uwe Stuerzenhofecker, experienced transformation leaders in the area of Tax and Customs processes. Their insights provide a deeper understanding of how the company is navigating this transformative process and the critical role of localization in ensuring global success.

Driving Enterprise Success - The Siemens Journey

Siemens serves various sectors, including industry, infrastructure, mobility, and healthcare. As a global powerhouse operating in more than 170 countries and boasting a rich history of innovation and reliability over its 175-year journey, Siemens has consistently adapted to the shifting business landscapes of digitalization and sustainability. The implementation of a clean core ERP system has been a game-changer. By aligning business processes with strategy and maintaining global standards, Siemens ensures lean operations and enhanced focus on delivering customer-centric solutions. This approach not only streamlines internal processes but significantly boosts customer satisfaction as clients experience tailored services that genuinely meet their local needs.

A key aspect of Siemens' transformation is the SHERPA X program, which aims to migrate the company's ERP systems to SAP S/4HANA. This ambitious project involves more than 1,000 legal entities across 60 different ERP systems, with SAP being the primary platform.

The Strategic Role of Harmonization and Localization

Localization is an integral part of the Siemens SAP S/4HANA transformation program. Siemens recognizes that a global template does not fit every country, and local legal requirements must be met. The localization process starts with deciding which country will be localized, followed by the creation of a country-specific blueprint that serves as a basis for future businesses operating in that country.

Siemens has a dedicated localization team that collaborates with regional experts to conduct fit-gap analyses and ensure that the template covers all legal requirements. This process involves a series of workshops and deep-dive sessions, engaging local experts to virtually discuss local legal requirements to be implemented for the end-to-end processes such as lead to cash, purchase to pay and record to report.

Siemens faces the challenge of aligning its vast operations across different regulatory, tax, and business landscapes. The solution? A robust localization strategy encompassed within their Siemens SAP S/4HANA transformation program. Here’s how they do it:

  1. Developing Country-Specific Blueprint: Starting with a baseline blueprint that encompasses all legal requirements of a country, Siemens crafts a foundational layer essential for compliance. This strategic move allows the company to confidently and swiftly enter new markets.
  2. Incorporating Business-Specific Adaptations: On top of this compliance layer, Siemens integrates specific business processes that are crucial for meeting the localized demands. This dual approach ensures that while the global standards are met, the solutions resonate well with local customers. Harmonization, in Siemens’ strategy, means standardizing core processes across the company while ensuring flexibility. The Siemens SAP S/4HANA transformation program focuses on creating a lean ERP core where indispensable functionalities reside, simplifying maintenance and integration of new technologies or processes.
  3. Ensuring Integrity and Consistency: A key aspect of Siemens’ strategy includes employing SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) to uphold data integrity across all their ERP systems. With MDG, Siemens streamlines data modifications which are only permissible in the central system, thereby maintaining consistency across all customer transactions and financial processes. This strategic governance assures that regardless of geographical boundaries, every operation within Siemens aligns with the core business standards.

A Beacon for Global Enterprises

One of the guiding principles of Siemens' localization approach is maintaining a lean ERP core. Siemens’ commitment to a clean core and comprehensive localization not only benefits their operation but also empowers their clients.

Siemens employs a range of SAP solutions, such as SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) for e-invoicing, SAP Global Trade Services (GTS) for customs and export control, and SAP Business Integrity Screening. These solutions work in harmony with the ERP system, providing a comprehensive and efficient platform for global operations.

The journey Siemens is on serves as an inspiring blueprint for many other global entities. By sharing their strategies and successes, we aim to embolden more enterprises to embrace and leverage localization in their business transformation endeavors. As we continue partnering with companies across various industries and regions, SAP remains dedicated to offering the essential tools and insights required for mastering the intricacies of global operations.

Summary

Siemens' journey towards digitalization and standardization is a testament to the company's commitment to staying ahead in an ever-evolving business landscape. By leveraging SAP's localization capabilities and maintaining a clean core, Siemens is well-positioned to navigate the complexities of global operations and deliver value to its customers.

As the Tax & Customs team continues to drive the specific localization requirements within the Siemens SAP S/4HANA transformation program, they are not only transforming Siemens' internal processes but also setting an example for other global enterprises looking to streamline their operations. The strategies and practices developed during this journey will undoubtedly serve as a valuable guide for other organizations aiming for global success. Through innovative localization and a focus on clean core principles, Siemens is paving the way for a more efficient, compliant, and customer-centric future.

Learn about Localization Today 

Siemens: How Can Automated Document Processing Reduce Compliance Costs Across the Globe?

Localization Capabilities on sap.com 

Accelerate Global Business Readiness with Localized SAP S/4HANA - SAPinsider

SAP Community for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance

SAP Community for Localization 

Regulatory Change Manager: Your Solution to Navigate Regulatory Changes with Ease

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors – Variable Pay – Bonus Plan with variable Individual percentage

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to delete the users from IAG repository?

entry.title: Warning message from BADI SD_SLS_CHECK_ITEM not shown in VA02 - Shown in fiori app Manage Sales Ord
entry.content:
Hello all,

 

We have an issue, a custom warning message that is being raised in the implementation of BADI SD_SLS_CHECK_ITEM (Key user extenisibility) is triggered both in the VA02 transaction and in the fiori apps Manages Sales Order BUT only in the fiori apps can we see the warning message being displayed at save.

I've checked for both triggers (VA02 - Manage Sales Orders), in both cases the parameter "messages" is populated with the custom message. It's unclear to me why the message isn't shown for the VA02 flow. 

Has anyone experienced a similar issue in the past? How did you solve it.

 

NOTE: We trigger the BADI implementation successfully in both cases.

entry.title: Re: On Integration Suite page, left menu items are not vi...
entry.content:
Hi

Did you assigned the roles to your user?
